data.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and relevant documentation to reflect the new dso:red-test-writer and dso:red-test-evaluator agents, the three-tier escalation protocol, and changes to sprint/fix-bug orchestrator behavior.

**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the RED test writer dispatch pattern, escalation protocol, and the new agent definitions to work correctly within the system.

**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section (agent routing, named-agent dispatch), CLAUDE.md quick reference updates, any existing docs that reference RED test phases or test writing dispatch
- OUT: New documentation files (update existing only)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md mentions dso:red-test-writer and dso:red-test-evaluator in the named-agent dispatch section
  ← Satisfies: Documentation completeness
- When this story is complete, the three-tier escalation protocol (sonnet → opus evaluation → opus retry → user escalation) is documented in CLAUDE.md
  ← Satisfies: Documentation completeness

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
